articles.title: Markets open higher on tech rebound
articles.text: Investors rotated back into large-cap technology names after a quiet macro session.

articles.title: City transit adds weekend routes
articles.text: The transport authority announced more weekend buses after rider demand increased in spring.

articles.title: Chipmakers rally after demand outlook improves
articles.text: Semiconductor suppliers gained after manufacturers signaled stronger cloud infrastructure orders.

articles.title: Coach confirms striker will miss derby
articles.text: The club expects a two-week recovery window and may rotate younger players into the lineup.

articles.title: Regional hospitals pilot AI triage assistant
articles.text: A consortium of hospitals started a pilot to shorten patient intake time in emergency units.

articles.title: Tech rebound extends into afternoon trading
articles.text: Software and chip stocks continued to rise as trading desks cited renewed risk appetite.

articles.title: Rain delays festival opening events
articles.text: Organizers moved several performances indoors and changed the evening schedule.

articles.title: Cloud vendors expand spending on data centers
articles.text: Suppliers reported new contracts tied to data center upgrades and AI infrastructure.

articles.title: League fines coach for sideline comments
articles.text: The league cited repeated public criticism of match officials after last weekend's game.

articles.title: Hospitals extend AI assistant pilot to clinics
articles.text: More clinics joined the pilot after early feedback suggested lower waiting times.

articles.title: Energy stocks lag broader market rally
articles.text: Oil producers weakened while investors favored growth-oriented sectors for a second session.

articles.title: Late train disruptions affect commuter lines
articles.text: Maintenance on two stations caused evening delays across several major commuter routes.

articles.title: Chip demand outlook lifts supplier forecasts again
articles.text: Analysts upgraded several suppliers after stronger procurement signals from cloud operators.

articles.title: Striker replacement scores in training match
articles.text: The reserve squad forward impressed coaches ahead of the weekend derby.

articles.title: Weekend market briefing highlights AI spending
articles.text: Analysts expect another active week for semiconductor and cloud infrastructure names.

articles.title: Public health dashboard adds clinic wait estimates
articles.text: Officials published a new dashboard that includes projected wait times by district.

articles.title: Transit authority shares summer station upgrade plan
articles.text: The agency plans phased station work and additional service notices during the summer.

articles.title: Cloud contracts push chip supply chain back into focus
articles.text: A fresh round of infrastructure commitments renewed attention on semiconductor capacity.
